button.name: %(property_payment_wizard_action)d
button.invisible: contract_type in ['new_contract','expire_contract','close_contract','cancel_contract'] or not active_contract_state or close_contract_state

button.name: action_cancel_contract
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this Contract?

button.name: create_utility_bill
button.invisible: handover_count == 0 or not is_maintenance_company or contract_type_name == 'lease'

label.invisible: rent == 'fixed' or contract_type_name != 'service' or property_type in ['land', 'industrial']

div.name: rent_smtr
div.invisible: rent == 'fixed' or contract_type_name != 'service' or property_type in ['land', 'industrial']

field.name: rent_smtr
field.invisible: rent == 'fixed' or contract_type_name != 'service' or property_type in ['land', 'industrial']

label.invisible: rent == 'fixed' or contract_type_name != 'service' or property_type not in ['land', 'industrial']

div.name: rent_smtr
div.invisible: rent == 'fixed' or contract_type_name != 'service' or property_type not in ['land', 'industrial']

field.name: rent_smtr
field.invisible: rent == 'fixed' or contract_type_name != 'service' or property_type not in ['land', 'industrial']
